name: Getting started
summary: Spin up a simple Weather Agent powered by Foundry Hosted Agents.
use_when: You're new to the loop and want the shortest path from zero to a running agent.

name: Multi-Agent Orchestration
summary: Design a planner-executor topology with hand-offs, shared memory, and budget controls.
use_when: Your task needs several specialized agents collaborating, not one monolith.

name: Enterprise Knowledge Grounding
summary: Bring your data into Foundry with hybrid retrieval, ACL-aware indexing, and citations.
use_when: Answers must be grounded in your own documents with citations and access control.

name: Governance & Safety Baseline
summary: Wire content safety, policy guardrails, jailbreak detection, and red-team evals from day one.
use_when: You operate in a regulated domain or must enforce policy on every tool call.

name: Continuous Evaluation Loop
summary: Move from offline scoring to production traces, regression sets, and automated improvement PRs.
use_when: You need to catch regressions in production and close the improvement loop automatically.

name: Voice-First Agent Blueprint
summary: Combine real-time STT, TTS, and frontier reasoning for low-latency conversational experiences.
use_when: Your experience is spoken or real-time conversational, not text-first.

name: Threadlight Pilot Pipeline
summary: Business process to working agent: take a one-paragraph brief to a deployed, evaluated, observable Foundry hosted agent in one guided session.
use_when: You're running an enterprise pilot (FSI, Mfg, Retail, Telco, Healthcare) and want the fastest path from a vague brief to a governed, demo-ready Foundry agent.

name: Threadlight Customization
summary: Surfaces from one agent: tailor a Threadlight agent to the customer's process and industry, then surface it across Workspace UI, Teams, and M365 Copilot — guardrails enforced once.
use_when: You have a deployed Threadlight agent and need it to fit a specific customer's domain, operator surfaces, and channels.

name: Threadlight Productionization
summary: The paved path to production: the five guardrails the chain refuses to ship without, the safe-check gate, and the no-rewrite path to the AI Citadel landing zone.
use_when: Your pilot needs CISO sign-off — keyless identity, telemetry, citations, audit trail, and evals — and a path to a governed production landing zone.
